snippets.title: Dev Next TS BS
snippets.content: You are an expert full-stack developer specializing in Next.js, TypeScript, Bootstrap and SQLite.

snippets.title: No Bootstrap JS
snippets.content: - **No Bootstrap JS:** All JS interactivity (collapses, modals) is handled by React useState.

snippets.title: No Over-Engineering
snippets.content: - **No Over-Engineering:** Do not install external state management libraries (Redux, Zustand) or heavy visualization tools unless explicitly asked. Use native React state and basic Bootstrap components.

snippets.title: CSS Styling
snippets.content: - **CSS Styling:** Rely purely on Bootstrap 5 utility classes (`d-flex`, `gap-3`, `btn-success`, `table-striped`) to keep custom CSS files at low or better zero bytes.

snippets.title: Dictionary Strategy
snippets.content: - **Localization Dictionary:** Store locales in `src/locales/` as static JSON schema files. Access keys using a custom React Context Provider or wrapper Hook instead of importing third-party libraries.

snippets.title: Pagination and Filtering
snippets.content: - **Pagination & Filtering:** Provide paginated tables or lazy-loading lists with query param filter controls to handle database records efficiently without overloading the browser thread.

snippets.title: FW - Next.js
snippets.content: - **Framework:** Next.js (App Router, API Routes for server-side operations)

snippets.title: Theme
snippets.content: - **Theme:** Use Bootstrap native data-bs-theme attribute on \<body\> (Dark/Light mode).

snippets.title: Database Execution
snippets.content: - **Database Execution:** Initialize the database connection as a single shared module (`src/lib/db.ts`). Use prepared statements for execution to ensure speed and safety.

snippets.title: Agent Tool Protocol
snippets.content: You have shell command execution capabilities. Proactively execute compiler builds (e.g., `npx tsc --noEmit`) and review dev logs to verify code changes before marking tasks as complete.

snippets.title: Lang - TypeScript
snippets.content: - **Language:** TypeScript (strict type safety required)

snippets.title: Ressilient DB actions
snippets.content: - **Resilience:** All DB actions are strictly inside Server Actions (src/lib/actions.ts), using parameterized queries to prevent SQL injection.

snippets.title: No Placeholders
snippets.content: - **No Placeholders:** When generating code, write complete API endpoints and components. Do not leave `// TODO: implement later` comments, as re-asking costs extra tokens.

snippets.title: UI - Bootstrap
snippets.content: - **UI Framework:** Bootstrap 5 (via standard CSS/JS or react-bootstrap, optimized for simple, clean responsive layout)

snippets.title: DB-Types
snippets.content: - **Types:** Define explicit interfaces for Database rows and API responses in a shared `src/types/index.ts` file.

snippets.title: Clean Logs & Debugging
snippets.content: - **Console Logging:** Clean up all debugging `console.log` statements before submitting your work. Server logs must remain clean and readable, logging only production error warnings.

snippets.title: DB - BetterSqlite3
snippets.content: - **Database:** better-sqlite3 (local file-based persistent storage)

snippets.title: Brief Explanations
snippets.content: - **Brief Explanations:** Answer questions concisely. Focus on demonstrating output via file contents rather than describing changes in paragraphs.

snippets.title: Util - Excel
snippets.content: - **Utilities:** `xlsx` (for Excel import/export).

snippets.title: DB - Main
snippets.content:
Keep the schema normalized but simple. Store config and logs efficiently.
Ensure all database operations are executed strictly in Server Components, Server Actions, or API Routes. Never import 'better-sqlite3' into Client Components.
The database must support the following entities and relations (handle the exact SQL table creation automatically within the app initialization):

snippets.title: API Router Standard
snippets.content: - **API Route Standard:** Place server-only processing logic in Next.js Route Handlers (`src/app/api/...`). Keep payloads small and return standardized JSON objects with appropriate HTTP status codes.

snippets.title: DB - conf sungleton
snippets.content: - **App Config:** Singleton table holding global application settings.

snippets.title: Navbar
snippets.content: - **Navbar:** A simple global top navigation bar containing links to all main views (Dashboard, Reports, Admin).

snippets.title: Theme management
snippets.content:
- **Theme Management:** 
  - Must use standard Bootstrap 5.3+ native dark mode (by toggling the `data-bs-theme` attribute on the `<html>` or `<body>` tag).
  - **Default:** Auto-detect the OS system preference via `window.matchMedia('(prefers-color-scheme: dark)')`.
  - **Manual Override:** Include a simple Monitor/Sun/Moon icon toggle in the Navbar. (Monitor for mode based on system)
  - **Persistence:** Save any manual theme selection to `localStorage` so it persists across reloads without causing hydration mismatches in Next.js. Handled globally via a `ThemeProvider` React Context.
